body_transformation: The bulb on its back transforms into a crystalline electric-blue orb with vibrant yellow circuit patterns etching its surface, while the body adopts a sleek, lean silhouette with neon-green circuitry tracing its limbs and torso. The once-plump form now features sharp, angular edges along the spine where jagged lightning-bolt spines protrude, and the tail tip glows with sparking fur tips. The red eyes retain their white highlights but now pulse with electric-blue energy, and the ear tips shimmer with neon-green static. The light green body coloration shifts to a matte electric-blue base with glowing yellow accents along the joints.
signature_feature: Back orb: crystalline electric-blue with vibrant yellow circuit patterns etching its surface.
